commits.subject: Day 114 (15:24): Enhance bash recovery hints with path-bounding and exit-code inspection guidance (Task 2)

eval.reason: Diff modifies only the bash exit-code hint string in `targeted_recovery_hint` to include explicit paths (`./script.sh`), immediate `$?` inspection, and `set -e`/`set -o pipefail` guidance — matching all four success criteria. Tests were updated to verify new hint text (3 new assertions for path-bounding, `set -e`, and immediate-check language) and build/tests pass.
